title: Barton Hall
body: Barton Hall is an on-campus field house on the campus of Cornell University in Ithaca, New York.  It is the site of the school's indoor track facilities, ROTC offices and classes, and Cornell Police.  For a long time, Barton Hall was the largest unpillared room in existence. The interior of the building covers almost 2 acres (8,100 m2), and includes a 1/8 mile (200m) indoor track.
